creator: manjoine@imediasolutions.net
text:
ok thanks that worked, now jsdk craps out.
 
 hecking JSDK... configure: error: javax.servlet.Servlet not found in
 /usr/local/share/java/classes/jsdk.jar
 
 checked the jar and there is nothing in it? any help?
 
 On Thu, 9 Nov 2000, Charlie Root wrote:
 
 > Chris Manjoine wrote:
 > 
 > > looks like the install of apache-jserve is broken I have tried everything
 > > from editing the configure.in the aclocal.m4 the acinclude.m4 and checking
 > > the grep function for the GNU make.
 > >
 > > Can someone please help the maintainer is not available?
